title: Sidebar cache v2: per-page blobs + delete-on-default + Browser Cache toolbar app
description: Restructure the sidebar collapse cache from one localStorage key per folder to one blob per page scope (docs: section root; issues: tracker:issue-id), store only deviations from the server-rendered default (delete-on-default), and add a Browser Cache dev-toolbar app (below Cache Inspector) that lists and clears the framework's localStorage state. Follow-up to 2026-05-07-sidebar-state-persistence, driven by review discussion of key growth and scan cost.
author: claude
